rationale: Trump administration's new Cuba oil sanctions and the nomination of Jay Clayton as DNI are fresh domestic policy moves with real implications; continued Lebanon strikes and US pressure on Israel over Gaza patients maintain Middle East relevance for Americans.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: New US sanctions on Cuba's oil company and Hegseth's Guantánamo visit signal active Cuba policy escalation; affects US-Cuba relations, potential migration flows, and domestic political debate.

top_events.title: Trump to pick Jay Clayton as Director of National Intelligence
top_events.summary: A new DNI nomination reshapes US intelligence leadership; relevant to domestic governance and national security policy continuity for American residents.

top_events.title: US lawmakers press Israel to let cancer patients out of Gaza
top_events.summary: Congressional pressure on Israel over Gaza humanitarian access reflects ongoing US political engagement; no new military deployment but keeps Middle East in domestic political spotlight.
